ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "barcode" TEXT /* Barcode of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the product */,
  "storage_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the storage location where the product is stored */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the product was created in the system */,
  "current_price" TEXT /* Current price of the product */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the product is deleted (0 = active, 1 = deleted) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the product information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_storage_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("storage_location_id") REFERENCES storage_locations ("storage_location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "image" TEXT /* Image representing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the supplier is located */,
  "vat_number" TEXT /* VAT number of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storage_locations" (
  "storage_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storage location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the storage location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the storage location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the storage location */,
  "capacity_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the capacity */,
  "aisle" INTEGER /* Aisle number where the storage location is situated */,
  "rack" INTEGER /* Rack number where the storage location is situated */,
  "bin" INTEGER /* Bin number where the storage location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("storage_location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "price_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price change */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product whose price was changed */,
  "price" TEXT /* New price of the product */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the price change became effective */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who made the price change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the price change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, staff) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory transaction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., add, remove) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction occurred */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who performed the transaction */,
  "transaction_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_transactions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_transactions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
